title: Hassan, Terrorist
actors: Rouïched, Tayeb Abou El Hassan, Mahieddine Bachtarzi
plot: Living in Algiers in 1956 is no bed of roses. Especially when you are a meek little fellow called Hassan who, to stay out of trouble, is all things to all people and whose only act of "bravery" is to (try to) rule his wife with a ...
